description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The structure features large, grid-style windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a fenced-in area with a driveway and two parked cars, as well as landscaped greenery and a small garden. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer windows and a tall privacy wall enclosing a section of the property. The house appears to have a single story with a spacious, open-plan interior layout, visible through the window arrangements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. Features include a fenced driveway, landscaped garden, and open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, fenced garden, and large grid windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the privacy wall, landscaped area, and fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a tall privacy wall, minimal windows, and a visible palm tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garden, and a mix of window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a modern door, fenced approach, and integrated garden with no porch or overhang.
